calendar.matters:
APPEAL OF CIVIL JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-01-2021 Affirmed
MINI MINUTES: Counsel for Appellant, Amanda Osowski appeared, but Respondent in Pro per, Anthony Videau did not appear. Matters submitted.

APPEAL OF CIVIL JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2020 Continued To Jan-08-21 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 622
MINI MINUTES: Counsel for Appellant, Amanda Osowski and respondent in Pro Per, Anthony Videau, both appeared. This case will be continue to 1/8/21, due to Judge Caffese recused herself, and three needs to be three judges on the appellate panel.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-05-2019 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, For Summary Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Sep-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dorothy Liu, Esq. 415-777-3200 of Hanson Bridgett for Apellant/Defendant CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION.
Jimmy Macias, Esq. 408-277-9682 of the Department of Industrial Relations, Labor Commissioner's Office for Respondent Anthony Videau.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court raises 4 issues. Both sides argue. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION A CALIFORNIA MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, For Summary Adjudication Of Issues.
